## What and why

<!-- What does this PR change, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The change comes with a new or updated test (see "Running tests" in the README)
- [ ] `composer review` passes locally
- [ ] The diff stays focused; unrelated cleanups are left for their own PR
- [ ] No GGG assets or game data are committed (icons, art, tree JSON, extracted files)
